current_implementation.technical_decision: Opcao B: preencher a aba MEMORIA diretamente com dados do Supabase
current_implementation.dependency_decision: exceljs was added because xlsx does not preserve workbook template styles, borders and merged-cell fidelity reliably.

document_generation_constraints: Fill MEMORIA directly from vw_unidade_detalhe data
Do not depend on the BASE sheet for the individual file
Do not depend on XLOOKUP for the individual file
Preserve template layout, formulas, borders and merged cells
Keep official document rules under human review
mandatory_after_task: Update decisions, roadmap, or backlog when scope or priority changes

last_validation.template_inspection: MEMORIA target cells confirmed in the template before implementation.
last_validation.generated_workbook_smoke: Generated two .xlsx files from fixture school units and inspected MEMORIA target cells with openpyxl; no XLOOKUP remained in MEMORIA and no #REF!, #VALUE! or #NAME? tokens were found.
last_validation.lint: passed with existing react-refresh warnings in masked-input.tsx and useExercicio.tsx
last_validation.build: passed: npm run build; existing large chunk warning remains, exceljs is dynamically imported into a separate chunk

after_this_pr: Validate the Vercel Preview with an authenticated session.
Open /escolas/:id and generate a Demonstrativo Basico from at least two real Supabase units.
Confirm each generated workbook opens in Excel and recalculates the Demonstrativo sheet from MEMORIA.
